prompt: Tournament context cue: tap right hole card.
why_v1: Hole-card anchor keeps hand reference stable before tournament-pressure action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The right hole card is the anchor, so the tournament read stays tied to the private-card cue that completes the tournament-pressure read.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The right hole card is the needed anchor because it changes the hand's playability and whether your tournament-context pressure is credible. Miss that card and you miss the blocker or equity detail that supports the action choice.
